I was there with my family, and I'll explain how it works. 
1= Zero security 
2= Rude 
3= Dirt everywhere
 4= Umbrella and deckchair 100 euros a day 
5= You can't bring your own food or drinks because you're forced to buy from them.
 6= You even pay for the air you breathe.
